rgb_pixel_simd_t(3) Library Functions Manual rgb_pixel_simd_t(3)

NAME

rgb_pixel_simd_t - SIMD-aligned RGB pixel structure for optimal NEON/AVX performance.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/rgba/image.h>

Data Fields


uint8_t r
Red color component (0-255). uint8_t g
Green color component (0-255). uint8_t b
Blue color component (0-255). uint8_t padding
Padding byte to align to 4-byte boundary (SIMD alignment).

Detailed Description

SIMD-aligned RGB pixel structure for optimal NEON/AVX performance.

SIMD-optimized RGB pixel structure with 4-byte alignment for efficient vector operations. Includes padding byte to align to 16-byte boundary for optimal SIMD (NEON/AVX/SSE) performance.

Note

Structure is 16-byte aligned for SIMD optimization.

Color components are in range 0-255.

Size: 4 bytes per pixel (includes padding).

Use this structure for SIMD-optimized image processing.

Definition at line 102 of file video/rgba/image.h.

Field Documentation

uint8_t rgb_pixel_simd_t::b

Blue color component (0-255).

Definition at line 105 of file video/rgba/image.h.

uint8_t rgb_pixel_simd_t::g

Green color component (0-255).

Definition at line 104 of file video/rgba/image.h.

uint8_t rgb_pixel_simd_t::padding

Padding byte to align to 4-byte boundary (SIMD alignment).

Definition at line 106 of file video/rgba/image.h.

uint8_t rgb_pixel_simd_t::r

Definition at line 103 of file video/rgba/image.h.
